positive: A highly stylized celestial forest scene, depicting bioluminescent flora and fauna under a deep twilight sky. The central composition features large, abstract silhouettes of stylized glowing mushroom clusters and gentle cosmic nebula flowing around stylized, crystalline tree branches. Use a strong contrast ratio with deep indigo, sapphire blue, and electric teal dominating the background, accented by vibrant neon pink and gold glow emanating from the 'plant' life. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meeting Sci-Fi graphic novel art. Composition: Symmetrical and highly detailed, suitable for repeat pattern printing or single chest print. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting and glowing subsurface scattering. High contrast, clean line work, vector-graphic quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, noisy, sketch, painting, photorealistic, gradient gradient, jpeg artifacts, dirty, messy
